title: Kangalile Lyrics Pencil Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Pencil Kangalilae Song Lyrics
Singers : Shreya Ghosal & Javed Ali
Movie : Pencil

Kangalile kangalile
Oru Kadugalavu therigiradhe
En mele en mele
Un kuru kuruppu neligiradhe.

Kallai Kulathinil aerindhaai
En nenjiil valayangal seidhaai.
Oh thalli nadandhida virumbi
Nee mella aruginil vandhaai

Melaadai thodumo...
...padumo
Kai viral thodumo
Kaal nagam padumo.

Pattaadai illaamal
Oru pottum illaamal
Nee vandhu nindraalum
Unpole varumo.

Kangalile kangalile
Oru Kadugalavu therigiradhe
En mele en mele
Un kuru kuruppu neligiradhe.

Vanna udaigalail nee vandhaal
En ennam sidharudhu penne .
Ennai maraithitta podhum
Adhai kaati koduppadhu kanne

Orupuram nee
Marupuram naan
Idaiyinil yaar.
Vetkam thaduppadhai paar.

Engae naan sendraalum
Enpaatil sendraalum
Kannaale yaen vandhaai
Pesaamal yaen sendraai.

Karkaalam pol indru
Sangeetha Sol ondru.
Nee veesi sendraalum
Podhaadhu enakku.

Kangalile kangalile
Oru Kadugalavu therigiradhe
En mele en mele
Un kuru kuruppu neligiradhe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kangalile?

The song Kangalile is a romantic melody that explores the emotions of love and longing.

Who are the singers of Kangalile?

The song is sung by Javed Ali and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for the movie Pencil?

The music for Pencil was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the release year of the movie Pencil?

The movie Pencil was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kangalile is a romantic duet from the movie Pencil, capturing the tender emotions of young love. Sung by Javed Ali and Shreya Ghoshal, the song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing and affection. GV Prakash Kumar's music beautifully complements the singers' voices, creating an enchanting atmosphere. The song reflects the innocence and intensity of first love, making it a favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kangalile from the movie Pencil is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of young love. Sung by the melodious voices of Javed Ali and Shreya Ghoshal, this song is a perfect blend of romance and soothing melodies. With GV Prakash Kumar's enchanting music, it promises to transport listeners to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: In the eyes, in the eyes, a moment is revealed. On me, on me, your mischievous glance falls.
Without knowing it, I lost myself bit by bit.
You jumped into the pond and made ripples in my heart. Oh, wanting to walk away, you came closer.
From the beginning, I thought of you as my destination. I made a good decision.
Will the veil touch... ...will it sing? Will the fingertips touch? Will the toenails sing?
Without clothes, without a dot, even if you stand, will anyone come like you?
In the eyes, in the eyes, a moment is revealed. On me, on me, your mischievous glance falls.
When you come in colorful clothes, my mind gets disturbed, girl. Even if you hide me, you reveal it, dear.
You on one side, me on the other, who is in between? See how shyness stops it.
Wherever I go, even in my song, why did you come with your eyes? Why did you leave without speaking?
Like the winter season today, a musical word. Even if you blow it, it's not enough for me.
In the eyes, in the eyes, a moment is revealed. On me, on me, your mischievous glance falls.
Without knowing it, I lost myself bit by bit.
